subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up from the conference. We're interested in exploring a potential partnership and would be happy to schedule a meeting.

We have the following slots available for a 2-hour discussion:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, and we'll send a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for internal contact details: we're unable to share direct contact information for our team members at this stage. All collaboration communication will be coordinated through this email address, and we'll ensure the appropriate stakeholders are included in all relevant discussions as we progress.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Team
company.internal
